updates.tweet_text:
Big Picture View #ES_F: Since early June, ES has built a massive bull flag. This week, it attempted breakout for the 1st time.

Plan Next Week: 7597, 7555=supports (watch traps). As long as they hold, 7675 next, dip, breakout to 7750. If 7555 fails, flag needs more time & we sell https://t.co/LkEUuRJH9O
updates.notes: 7675 named explicitly as 'next' target in bull scenario — not in morning plan. 7597, 7555, 7750 are all existing plan levels.

updates.tweet_text: @Porterhous90889 Won't be non-stop, but as I've said regularly for two years we're in the early to mid stages of a bull market. Still 2-4 years left at the very least but could be longer
updates.notes: Pure macro commentary about bull market duration; no price levels named or actionable entries/exits referenced.

updates.tweet_text: @NYJets2017 @Porterhous90889 Not rocket science! SPX and its predecessors have been doing the same thing for over 100 years yet everytime people think they are smarter than the market and "this time is different". They miss out everytime
updates.notes: Reply tweet with general market philosophy commentary; no prices or actionable levels mentioned at all.
